## Node Description
A clear and concise description of the node you'd like added.

## Use Case
What workflow or problem would this node solve?

## Proposed Inputs
List the expected inputs for this node.

## Proposed Outputs
List the expected outputs for this node.

## Example Usage
Describe or show an example of how this node would be used in a flow.

## Additional Context
Any other context, references, or examples about the node request.
